scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run -w backend build && npm run -w frontend build
scripts.lint: npm run -w backend lint && npm run -w frontend lint
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w backend typecheck && npm run -w frontend typecheck
scripts.openapi: npm run openapi:dump && npm run openapi:codegen
